# cloudtemple_vpc_static_ip (Data Source)

Used to retrieve a specific static IP.

To query this datasource you will need the `vpc_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudtemple_vpc_static_ip" "example" {
  id = "b0660713-c033-48cd-b9ea-7e552f4e06aa"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the static IP to retrieve.

### Read-Only

- `floating_ip_address` (String) The address of the floating IP bound to this static IP.
- `floating_ip_id` (String) The ID of the floating IP bound to this static IP.
- `ip_address` (String) The static IP address.
- `mac_address` (String) The MAC address of the network adapter.
- `network_adapter_id` (String) The ID of the network adapter associated with this static IP.
- `private_network_id` (String) The ID of the private network.
- `resource_description` (String) The description of the resource (for custom sources).
- `source` (String) The source of the virtual machine (xoa, vmware, or custom).
- `virtual_machine_id` (String) The ID of the virtual machine associated with this static IP.
- `vpc_id` (String) The ID of the VPC.
